command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
AIDER=/home/jose/.local/bin/aider

echo "=== FIND MESSAGE FLAGS ==="
$AIDER --help 2>&1 | grep -E "message|msg|file" | head -15

echo "=== TEST --msg ==="
echo "test" > /tmp/aider_test_msg.txt
$AIDER --msg "hello test" --help 2>&1 | head -2

echo "=== TEST --message ==="
$AIDER --message "hello test" --help 2>&1 | head -2

echo "=== FULL HELP: message section ==="
$AIDER --help 2>&1 | grep -A2 "message\|msg\|chat" | head -30
' 2>&1
echo DONE_1969
